name: explain_symbol_context
description: Best first tool for understanding a resolved symbol. Returns compact symbol details, top member handles, related guide handles, resource URI, and recommended next tools without loading full guide pages.

detail.description: MCP response detail level. Defaults to compact; use full for a larger payload.

symbol.description: Exact symbol id, fully-qualified type name, or fully-qualified member signature.

includeMembers.description: Include a compact list of type members. Defaults to true for types and false for members.

memberLimit.description: Maximum number of compact type members to include in the context envelope.
